name: Nomdara Council of Elders
summary: Elder council coordinating mobile Nomdara judgment, long-memory diplomacy, and caravan priorities.
day_to_day: Hears disputes, assigns routes, preserves caravan memory, and mediates between nodes.
who_works_there: Elders, memory keepers, caravan captains, negotiators.
who_uses_it: Nomdara families, caravan crews, outside partners seeking sanctioned agreements.
authority: Moral and practical authority over caravan legitimacy and memory-backed rulings.
public_manifestation: Hearing wagons, traveling council camps, elder seals, and route advisories.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Memory-rich judgment is powerful, but it can slow urgent decisions when the road demands speed.
